caption: In a medical simulation setting, three women in scrubs and jackets stand around a patient mannequin lying on a hospital bed. Two women wear black jackets over blue scrubs, while a third woman wears blue scrubs and a black face mask. They are wearing blue medical gloves and appear to be conducting a clinical assessment. The mannequin has red hair and is covered with a white sheet and a patterned gown. The room contains medical equipment, shelves with supplies, and a wall clock. A magenta banner across the lower third of the scene displays the text "Day 1", "ED Consult", and "Sim Week" alongside a silhouette logo. As the scene progresses, the women shift their positions slightly around the bed, and the mannequin's position is adjusted, revealing more of its patterned hospital gown.
